highlights: Collaborated on large-scale hospitality, property tracking, and sales management systems.
Implemented a Property Management System (PMS) Accounts Receivable module with dedicated ledger views and dynamic sidebar navigation.

Developed real-time standalone and integrated digital signage software synced with the core sales ecosystem.
Spearheaded technical architecture and stack selection for a modern property and resort management platform.
Designed and bridged first-party consumer-facing and client-side applications for real-time data synchronization.
Partnered with local designers and stakeholders to build an interactive platform for an LGU to showcase regional artists.
Delivered a responsive web experience that directly increased online visibility for the creative community.
